query:
UPDATE products SET tab = CASE 
  WHEN title LIKE '%anklet%' THEN 'anklets'
  WHEN title LIKE '%body%' OR title LIKE '%belly%' THEN 'body-jewelry'
  WHEN title LIKE '%bracelet%' AND title NOT LIKE '%ankle%' THEN 'bracelets'
  WHEN title LIKE '%brooch%' OR title LIKE '%pin%' THEN 'brooches-pins'
  WHEN title LIKE '%earring%' THEN 'earrings'
  WHEN title LIKE '%set%' THEN 'jewelry-sets'
  WHEN title LIKE '%necklace%' THEN 'necklaces'
  WHEN title LIKE '%ring%' THEN 'rings'
  ELSE 'anklets'
END;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.f21199908ec6 --database Fb7vXnzeJhLwFywj8Ci5L6 --execute UPDATE products SET tab = CASE 
  WHEN title LIKE '%anklet%' THEN 'anklets'
  WHEN title LIKE '%body%' OR title LIKE '%belly%' THEN 'body-jewelry'
  WHEN title LIKE '%bracelet%' AND title NOT LIKE '%ankle%' THEN 'bracelets'
  WHEN title LIKE '%brooch%' OR title LIKE '%pin%' THEN 'brooches-pins'
  WHEN title LIKE '%earring%' THEN 'earrings'
  WHEN title LIKE '%set%' THEN 'jewelry-sets'
  WHEN title LIKE '%necklace%' THEN 'necklaces'
  WHEN title LIKE '%ring%' THEN 'rings'
  ELSE 'anklets'
END;
